'''Fortress Baarlos''' was an ancient citadel that had been built on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Pochi]] some [[10,000 BBY|ten thousand years]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. [[Faarl]] the Conqueror renovated this fortress and used it as his base, placing it under the protection of his [[Tulvaree]] guards. The fortress was all but impenetrable; until [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] found his way inside. The way he found his way inside is known only to [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] . Many speculate he navigated through its caverns with skill... or luck?
